reference: My heart has been fluttering a lot lately to the point where my pulse rate goes really high when all I'm doing is sitting. I am a twenty-three-year-old female, and last Saturday I experienced some really bad pain in my chest that shot from my chest to my shoulder and then to my elbow. It was horrible. I have extremely low calcium D levels, and I was wondering if maybe that could have been the cause or possibly a heart attack.
text: My heart has been fluttering a lot lately, to the point where my pulse rate goes really high when all I'm doing is sitting. I am a 23-year-old female, and last Saturday I experienced some really bad pain in my chest that shot from my chest to my shoulder and then to my elbow. It was horrible. I have extremely low calcium D levels, and I was wondering if maybe that could have been the cause, or possibly a heart attack.
